steps.title: Identify what the task requires
steps.content: The student's goal is explicitly stated: compare the sizes of the two mountain ranges. The notes provide the specific measurements needed to make this comparison—1,141 mi² for the El Carmen-Verde Mountains and 63 mi² for the Sierrita Mountains.

steps.title: Select the choice that directly achieves this goal
steps.content: Choice B accomplishes the comparison by presenting both measurements side-by-side (1,141 mi² versus 63 mi²), directly using the relevant data to answer the question. The alternatives either generalize about size variation without comparing these two (A), omit size information entirely (C), or substitute sky island definitions instead of size comparison (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
